prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large red metal cube
  - obj_1: small gray rubber sphere
  - obj_2: small yellow rubber cube
  - obj_3: small green rubber sphere
  - obj_4: large purple metal sphere
  - obj_5: small red rubber cylinder
  - obj_6: large yellow metal cube

Questions:
[qrr_0041] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0042] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0043] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0044] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0045] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0046] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0047] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0048] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0049] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0050] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0051] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0052] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0053] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0054] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0055] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0056] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0057] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0058] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0059] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0060] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D positions of objects in the scene and compare distances between pairs.

Let me identify the approximate positions of each object:
- obj_0 (large red metal cube): far back, right area
- obj_1 (small gray rubber sphere): front center
- obj_2 (small yellow rubber cube): back left area
- obj_3 (small green rubber sphere): front right area
- obj_4 (large purple metal sphere): left side, middle depth
- obj_5 (small red rubber cylinder): center, middle depth
- obj_6 (large yellow metal cube): right side, middle depth

Let me estimate coordinates (x, y, z) where z is depth:
- obj_0 (red metal cube): (0.6, 0.3, -0.8)
- obj_1 (gray sphere): (0.0, 0.0, 0.5)
- obj_2 (yellow rubber cube): (-0.3, 0.2, -0.5)
- obj_3 (green sphere): (0.5, 0.0, 0.2)
- obj_4 (purple sphere): (-0.7, 0.1, 0.0)
- obj_5 (red cylinder): (0.1, 0.1, -0.1)
- obj_6 (yellow metal cube): (0.8, 0.1, -0.2)

Now computing distances:

obj_0-obj_5: sqrt((0.5)²+(0.2)²+(0.7)²) ≈ sqrt(0.25+0.04+0.49) ≈ 0.88
obj_2-obj_3: sqrt((0.8)²+(0.2)²+(0.7)²) ≈ sqrt(0.64+0.04+0.49) ≈ 1.08
obj_2-obj_6: sqrt((1.1)²+(0.1)²+(0.3)²) ≈ sqrt(1.21+0.01+0.09) ≈ 1.13
obj_3-obj_4: sqrt((1.2)²+(0.1)²+(0.2)²) ≈ sqrt(1.44+0.01+0.04) ≈ 1.21
obj_4-obj_6: sqrt((1.5)²+(0)²+(0.2)²) ≈ sqrt(2.25+0.04) ≈ 1.51
obj_0-obj_6: sqrt((0.2)²+(0.2)²+(0.6)²) ≈ sqrt(0.04+0.04+0.36) ≈ 0.66
obj_1-obj_3: sqrt((0.5)²+(0)²+(0.3)²) ≈ sqrt(0.25+0.09) ≈ 0.58
obj_1-obj_5: sqrt((0.1)²+(0.1)²+(0.6)²) ≈ sqrt(0.01+0.01+0.36) ≈ 0.62
obj_2-obj_4: sqrt((0.4)²+(0.1)²+(0.5)²) ≈ sqrt(0.16+0.01+0.25) ≈ 0.66
obj_2-obj_5: sqrt((0.4)²+(0.1)²+(0.4)²) ≈ sqrt(0.16+0.01+0.16) ≈ 0.58
obj_3-obj_5: sqrt((0.4)²+(0.1)²+(0.3)²) ≈ sqrt(0.16+0.01+0.09) ≈ 0.51
obj_4-obj_5: sqrt((0.8)²+(0)²+(0.1)²) ≈ sqrt(0.64+0.01) ≈ 0.81
obj_1-obj_2: sqrt((0.3)²+(0.2)²+(1.0)²) ≈ sqrt(0.09+0.04+1.0) ≈ 1.06
obj_3-obj_6: sqrt((0.3)²+(0.1)²+(0.4)²) ≈ sqrt(0.09+0.01+0.16) ≈ 0.51
obj_4-obj_6: ≈ 1.51
obj_5-obj_6: sqrt((0.7)²+(0)²+(0.1)²) ≈ sqrt(0.49+0.01) ≈ 0.71
obj_1-obj_4: sqrt((0.7)²+(0.1)²+(0.5)²) ≈ sqrt(0.49+0.01+0.25) ≈ 0.87
obj_2-obj_4: ≈ 0.66
